ksa_text: Knowledge of data modeling and schema design techniques, including conceptual, logical, and physical modeling approaches, entity-relationship diagrams, dimensional modeling approaches for analytics, and design trade-offs between normalization and query performance.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Data Architecture & Analytics is a primary or secondary domain for the Director of Data Quality. This knowledge KSA is within scope for the role's expected competency profile and seniority level (director).

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (Data Architecture & Analytics), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Framework signal is weak (composite 0.379). External validation of this knowledge KSA for the Director of Data Quality role relies primarily on domain-level alignment rather than specific framework matches.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: DAMA-DMBOK, analytics maturity models (Gartner, Forrester), and analytics leadership surveys confirm data architecture and analytics competencies for senior roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: domain-level relevance of Data Architecture & Analytics for the Director of Data Quality is corroborated by DAMA-DMBOK, CDO survey data, and role-specific job market analysis, despite weak cross-framework signal.

decision_rationale: Data Architecture & Analytics knowledge KSA is within scope for the Director of Data Quality at the director tier. Seniority fit is appropriate. All three evaluation passes support inclusion.
